channel.title: Mental
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Mental, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Coping with Grief: What to Expect After the Loss of a Loved One
item.description: Losing someone close is among the most difficult experiences a person can face. This overview explains the bereavement process and ways to navigate it.

item.title: What Is Cushing's Syndrome and How Does Cortisol Affect the Body?
item.description: Cushing's syndrome results from prolonged elevated cortisol levels. This explainer covers how the condition develops, its symptoms, and what distinguishes it from normal hormonal fluctuations.

item.title: How the 'Let Them' Theory May Improve How You Relate to Others
item.description: The 'Let Them' theory proposes that releasing the need to control others' behavior can reduce conflict and lead to healthier, more balanced personal relationships.

item.title: Double Texting Explained: What It Means and When It Makes Sense
item.description: Double texting — sending a follow-up message before receiving a reply — is a common dilemma. This piece examines the social dynamics and when it may be appropriate.

item.title: Sobering Up: What Actually Works and What the Evidence Says
item.description: After drinking, many people look for ways to feel clearer faster. This overview examines ten approaches and what science says about their effectiveness.
